titles.title: Caribbean Medley (I've Got My Mind Made Up)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v2 v3 v4 v4 v1 v5 v6 v7 v1 v8 v9 v1 v1 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've got my mind made up and I won't turn back Because I want to see my Jesus someday I've got my mind made up and I won't turn back Because I want to see my Jesus someday

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Goodbye world, I stay no longer with you Goodbye pleasures of sin, I stay no longer with you I've made up my mind to go God's way the rest of my life I've made up my mind to go God's way the rest of my life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Born, born, born again Thank God, I'm born again Born, born, born again Thank God, I'm born again Born, born, born again Thank God, I'm born again Born, born, born again Thank God, I'm born again

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Born of the water, spirit and the blood Thank God, I'm born again Born of the water, spirit and the blood Thank God, I'm born again

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I am under the rock, The rock that's higher than I (but the rock is higher) (Jehovah Hide me) Jehovah hide me, I am under the rock (oh yeah) (Go tell my enemies) Go tell my enemies, I am under the rock (yes I am) Jehovah hide me, I am under the rock

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Jesus name so sweet, Emanuel name so sweet Jesus name so sweet, Emanuel name so sweet Jesus name so sweet, Emanuel name so sweet Jesus name so sweet, Emanuel name so sweet

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Every rock, me rock upon Jesus, Jesus' name so sweet Every rock, me rock upon Jesus, Jesus' name so sweet Every rock, me rock upon Jesus, Jesus' name so sweet Every rock, me rock upon Jesus, Jesus' name so sweet

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Oh, I want to see Him, look upon His face There, to sing forever of His saving grace On the streets of glory let me lift my voice All my cares are past, home at last, ever to rejoice

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Yes I want to see Him, look upon His face There, to sing forever love forever love of His saving grace On the streets of glory let me lift my voice All my cares are past, home at last, ever to rejoice

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Fire, fire, fire Fire fall on me Fire, fire, fire Fire fall on me On the day of Pentecost, the fire fall on me On the day of Pentecost, the fire fall on me Fire, fire, fire Fire fall on me
